compressed_prompt: write a five-line poem with a aaaba rhyme scheme about binge-watching, including "netflix" in lowercase
response:
Here is a five-line poem with an aaaba rhyme scheme about binge-watching:

The glow of netflix lights the night,
Episode after episode, pure delight,
One more chapter, just one more,
My blanket pulled up tight,
I'll sleep when morning turns to white.
